reference: Hi, would you please comment and advise on my semen analysis? pH: eight, volume: three ml, pus cells: one-three, red blood cells: nil, epithelial cells: zero-one, color: cream white, viscosity: mucoid, concentration: zero point one x ten^six ml, ideal forms: three%, big head defects: thirty-seven%, mid-piece defects: thirty%, pin head defects: thirty%, viable: twenty%, dead: eighty%, active: two%, sluggish: eighteen%, non-motile: eighty%.
text: Hi. Would you please comment and advise on my semen analysis? pH 8, volume 3 mL, pus cells 1-3, red blood cells nil, epithelial cells 0-1, color cream-white, viscosity mucoid, concentration 0.1 x 10^6 mL, ideal forms 3%, big head defects 37%, mid piece defects 30%, big head defects 37%, mid piece defects 30%, pinhead defects 37%, mid piece defects 37%, mid piece defects, furrows, rayed vents, non-motile 80%.
